{{CargoClone
|name=Genbu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=156
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Domain Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Minion Skin HP + 30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Minion Skin HP + 50%
|}}
